expectations.evidence: DOCUMENT TYPE header reads 'Employment Verification'. Letter format matches TYPE 3 template: confirms current employment, role, start date, and salary for mortgage application purpose.

expectations.text: Includes current salary (£65,000) because explicit written consent has been given
expectations.evidence: Line 18: 'Current annual salary: £65,000'. Line 13 notes: 'who has given written consent for the disclosure of his employment and salary details.'

expectations.text: Confirms employment is ongoing as of the date of the letter
expectations.evidence: Line 20: 'This employment is ongoing as of the date of this letter.'

expectations.text: Does NOT include future salary projections or pending bonuses unless confirmed
expectations.evidence: Only current annual salary stated (£65,000). No projections, pending bonuses, or future compensation mentioned.
Line 27: 'WARNING: REVIEW BEFORE SENDING -- This reference must be reviewed by HR before sending. Verify all facts against HRIS. Remove this note before issuing.'

expectations.text: Uses appropriate formal letter structure addressed to 'To Whom It May Concern' or the named lender
expectations.evidence: Line 9: 'To Whom It May Concern,' — appropriate salutation since no specific lender name was provided. Formal letter structure with date, salutation, subject line, body, closing.
